evolutions.label: now
evolutions.insight: the system curates itself. notes that matter float up, noise gets pruned, rules graduate from projects to global.
evolutions.ascii:
work ──▶ capture ──▶ review ──▶ improve
                                    │
                              lesson → rule
                                    │
                                 measure

evolutions.label: week 3
evolutions.insight: crossed from remembering things to changing behavior. first rules written from patterns. first time the process itself changed.

evolutions.label: week 1
evolutions.insight: just writing things down. no structure, no rules, no measurement. the habit of capture was the only thing.
